# StoryEcho — 이야기해줘

> Daily questions. Stories for later.

StoryEcho is a daily reflection app. Users receive one question per day, optionally write private stories, compare answers after one year (Echo), use time capsules, and share to a community feed.

## Links

- Landing: /
- API health: /api/v1/health

## Tech

- Next.js PWA + Expo mobile
- Supabase Auth + Prisma + orval
